flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Missouri Valley College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($14.2k → $16.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Missouri Valley College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (25.2% → 22.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Missouri Valley College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Missouri Valley College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (47.2% → 53.0%).
